chapter_title.en: Chapter 123 – The Tawaaf and touching the corners

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/23)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/23)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا يَسْتَلِمُ إِلَّا الرُّكْنَ الْأَسْوَدَ وَ الْيَمَانِيَّ ثُمَّ يُقَبِّلُهُمَا وَ يَضَعُ خَدَّهُ عَلَيْهِمَا وَ رَأَيْتُ أَبِي يَفْعَلُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Giyas Bin Ibrahim,

(It has been narrated) from Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, from his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> did not touch except for the corner of the Black (Stone), and the Yamani (corner). Then he<sup>saww</sup> kissed them both, and placed his<sup>saww</sup> cheek upon them both, and I<sup>asws</sup> saw my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> doing it’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause,’ would not touch anything except the corner of the Black Stone and al-Yemaniy corner. He (the Messenger of Allah) kissed them and placed his cheek against them and I saw my father also did so.’”
